docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-23-1993, CONTINUED TO OCT-29-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE OF CONDITIONAL SETTLEMENT; CON SETT AGREE AND STIP FOR JUD FILED BY PLF. MATTER IS CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCTOBER 23, 1993 FOR STATUS CONFERENCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
